description.format:
***GenAI Summary & RCA updated – new alert correlated.***
The Gen AI Summary: 
%1$s.

The Gen AI Root Cause: 
%2$s.

Description: %3$s

work_notes.format: Merged Insight: This Incident is resolved as this insight has been merged and is no longer being updated. All alerts have been merged into a new insight because a larger correlation has been found. Navigate to new insight from here [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT.

Insight: Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight escalated to Critical, hence the incident Priority is escalated. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight: Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight escalated to Major/Error, hence the incident Priority is escalated. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight: Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight de-escalated to Warning/Indeterminate (Suppressed). As per the configured decision drivers, the incident is resolved. Current Insight Severity: %8$s (2: Warning; 1: Indeterminate) The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight is in cleared State, and all correlated alerts are now cleared. As per the configured decision drivers, the incident is being automatically resolved. The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. Insight is Active, triggering incident reopening. At least one correlated alert is active with severity above Warning. Please review the Insight for alert details. Current Insight Severity: %8$s (5: Critical; 4: Major) The Insight state is %2$s. The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).

Insight updated by Edwin [code] ML-Insight [/code]. The Insight state is %2$s. Current Insight Severity: %8$s (5: Critical; 4: Major; 2: Warning; 1: Indeterminate; 0: Clear) The number of correlated Alerts is %3$d. The last event timestamp is %4$tF %4$tT. Please Note: Edwin AI Auto-Resolution Decision Fields. • Edwin AI Rule: %5$s • Automatic Incident Resolution: %6$s — (True = Enabled | False = Disabled) • Resolve on Warning/SDT: %7$s — (True = Enabled (auto-resolve on Warning/SDT) | False = Disabled (resolve only when Cleared)).
